migration_name: Handover 0116 Part B - Legacy Agent-Only Files to MCPAgentJob

migrations.migration_notes: Agent fixtures were zombie code - tests only use agent_name/agent_role strings. product.py tools don't query Agent model, just use strings for role-based filtering. Removed 3 agent fixtures (implementer, tester, orchestrator) and 1 inline agent creation. Added description field to Project fixtures for NOT NULL constraint. Also fixed syntax error in models.py (incomplete last_message_check_at column definition).
schema_fixes: Added Project.description to all project fixtures

migrations.test_failure_reason: Database schema mismatch - MCPAgentJob.failure_reason column missing (pre-existing issue)
migrations.migration_notes: Migrated session_info() function from Agent to MCPAgentJob. Changed import from Agent to MCPAgentJob (line 710) and query from select(Agent) to select(MCPAgentJob) (line 714). Status field usage remains unchanged (both models use same status enum). Also updated test helper tests/utils/tools_helpers.py to create MCPAgentJob instead of Agent (changed create_test_agent function signature and implementation).
